description: The enterprise security team is rolling out a Zero-Trust Network Access (ZTNA) policy. Rename the 'Asset Name' field of all laptops assigned to the Engineering department to match the authoritative ITAM database naming convention: [Location_Code]-[Department_Code]-[Asset_Tag]. Use Location Codes LON (London), BER (Berlin), or TYO (Tokyo) and Department Code ENG (Engineering). For example, a laptop with asset tag ASSET-8003 in Berlin must be named BER-ENG-ASSET-8003. Do not modify the Asset Name of laptops assigned to the Marketing department or any unassigned ('Ready to Deploy') laptops.
